business_description: Sakura Spa is a professional massage therapy clinic staffed by registered massage therapists. We specialize in therapeutic massage services including hot stone massage, deep tissue massage, and relaxation massage, offering both individual sessions and value-packed service packages.
scheduling_insight: wants to attract more customers during weekdays 9am-5pm, which are slower periods
highlights: Multiple massage specialties including hot stone and deep tissue
Flexible scheduling with both 30 and 60-minute sessions available
